titleStmt.title: SII 38.58: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 58. (A.R. No. 58 of 1912.) CHOḌAVARAM, VIRAVALLI TALUK, VIZAGAPATAM DISTRICT. On a pillar, same temple.

summary.p: It records the gift of the village of Duttāḍa to the temple of Vallabharāja by Vīrapratāpai-siṅgarāja, son of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Pratāpa Śrīraṅgarāja of Voḍḍādi. It also states that the king belonged to the Matsya-vaṁsa which is indicated by the figures of two fish on pedestals, cut at the end of the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākābdētrayavātuviśva
gaṇititvabdē kharākhyē śubhē
vaiśākhēkṣatṛtiyyake ravi
dinamatsvanvayāyā
graṇi śrīraṁggakṣitipāla
sūnuramalō śrī śiṁgga

bhūpālakoduttāḍa
stiramākka somaku dhara
śrīvallabhāyākhyayā
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍā
leśvarulaina voḍḍādi pratā
pa śrīraṁggarājulku kumā

ruṁḍāĪna śrīvīrapratāpa
siṁggarājulu tamaku
nnu māmatsvavaṁśapurā
julakunnu sugṛtaṁgā
nunnu Āyuṣṭhāmā
rddhasiddhigānunnu putra
pautrābhivriddhigānunnu

rājyābhivriddhigānunnu du
ttāḍagrāmaṁ śrīvallabha
rāyalaku Aṣṭabhōgasi
ddhigānu dhārādattaṁ sēsi
Istimi Ī dharmmānaku ye
rājulu tappinānu Ārā

rājulunnulu rājula praja
nulunnu gaṁggakarttagōvu
lannu brāhmalannu svahasta
vadasēsina pāpānaṁ bōdu
ru sihyādrinādaṁḍu
Āragiṁcci Amṛtamaṇilō
viṣaṁpetna doṣānaṁbōduru
Digital edition of SII 38.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
